lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਭੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤੋਟਾ ਹਿਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਤਿਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: laabh milai tottaa hirai har daragah pativant |
lines.english: You shall earn profit and suffer no loss, and in the Court of the Lord you shall be honored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਵੈ ਸਾਚ ਸਾਹ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan sanchavai saach saah bhagavant |
lines.english: Those who gather in the riches of the Lord's Name are truly wealthy, and very blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਛੁਟਿ ਗਈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬਸੇ ਚੀਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak duramat chhutt gee paarabraham base cheet |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, evil-mindedness is eradicated, when the Supreme Lord God comes to dwell in the mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਹੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat har bhajahu saadhoo sang pareet |
lines.english: So, when standing up and sitting down, vibrate upon the Lord, and cherish the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਭਏ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sant niramal bhe jin man vasiaa soe |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Saints are pure and immaculate; the Lord abides within their minds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਬਿਆਪਹਿ ਜਗਤ ਕਉ ਤੁਰੀਆ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: teen biaapeh jagat kau tureea paavai koe |
lines.english: The world is in the grip of the three qualities; only a few attain the fourth state of absorption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਤੀਆ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਖੈ ਫਲ ਕਬ ਉਤਮ ਕਬ ਨੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: triteea trai gun bikhai fal kab utam kab neech |
lines.english: The third day of the lunar cycle: Those who are bound by the three qualities gather poison as their fruit; now they are good, and now they are bad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਸੁਰਗ ਭ੍ਰਮਤਉ ਘਣੋ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਘਾਰੈ ਮੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: narak surag bhramtau ghano sadaa sanghaarai meech |
lines.english: They wander endlessly in heaven and hell, until death annihilates them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਏ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਚਿਤਵਹਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kee tiseh na jaananee chitaveh anik upaae |
lines.english: They do not know the One who created them; they think up all sorts of schemes and plans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਸਹਸਾ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog sahasaa sansaar hau hau karat bihaae |
lines.english: In pleasure and pain and worldly cynicism, they pass their lives acting in ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪੂਰਨ ਧਨੀ ਨਹ ਬੂਝੈ ਪਰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham pooran dhanee neh boojhai parataap |
lines.english: They do not realize the glorious radiance of the Supreme Lord God, the Perfect Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਧਿ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਉਪਾਧਿ ਰਸ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਤੂਟੈ ਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: aadh biaadh upaadh ras kabahu na toottai taap |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are distracted by pleasure and pain, and their fever never departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇਰੀ ਆਸ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh raakh lehu naanak teree aas |3|
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Mercy, God, and save me! Nanak places his hopes in You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਭਰਮ ਬੂਡਤ ਘਣੋ ਮਹਾ ਨਰਕ ਮਹਿ ਵਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: moh bharam booddat ghano mahaa narak meh vaas |
lines.english: So many are being drowned in emotional attachment and doubt; they dwell in the most horrible hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਅਸਟ ਸਿਧਿ ਭਜੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath asatt sidh bhaj naanak har naam |4|
lines.english: The four cardinal blessings, and the eight spiritual powers of the Siddhas are obtained, O Nanak, by meditating, vibrating on the Lord's Name. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰ ਸਿਆਣਾ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਤਜਿਆ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: chatur siaanaa sugharr soe jin tajiaa abhimaan |
lines.english: One who renounces egotistical pride is intelligent, wise and refined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰਥਿ ਚਾਰੇ ਬੇਦ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੋਧਿਓ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaturath chaare bed sun sodhio tat beechaar |
lines.english: The fourth day of the lunar cycle: Listening to the four Vedas, and contemplating the essence of reality, I have come to realize

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਖੇਮ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sarab khem kaliaan nidh raam naam jap saar |
lines.english: that the treasure of all joy and comfort is found in sublime meditation on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਚੁ ਹੁਟੈ ਜਮ ਤੇ ਛੁਟੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨ ਪਰਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: meech huttai jam te chhuttai har keeratan paraves |
lines.english: death is overcome, and one escapes the Messenger of Death, by absorption in the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ਦੁਖ ਹਰੈ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਕਲੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: narak nivaarai dukh harai tootteh anik kales |
lines.english: One is saved from hell, suffering is destroyed, countless pains depart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਦਾਰਿਦ ਅਪਵਿਤ੍ਰਤਾ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: dukh daarid apavitrataa naaseh naam adhaar |
lines.english: Pain, poverty and impurity are removed, with the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਸੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhau binasai amrit rasai rang rate nirankaar |
lines.english: Fear departs, and one savors the Ambrosial Nectar, imbued with the Love of the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਖੋਜਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar mun jan khojate sukh saagar gopaal |
lines.english: The angels, the seers and the silent sages search for the Ocean of peace, the Sustainer of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਹੋਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਰਵਾਲ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: man niramal mukh aoojalaa hoe naanak saadh ravaal |4|
lines.english: The mind becomes pure, and one's face is radiant, O Nanak, when one becomes the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saadhasang hoe niramalaa naanak prabh kai rang |5|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, one becomes pure, O Nanak, imbued with the Love of God. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਸੇ ਰਾਚੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: panch bikaar man meh base raache maaeaa sang |
lines.english: The five evil passions dwell in the mind of one who is engrossed in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸਮ ਬਾਸ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਘਣੋ ਸਭ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਬਲਬੰਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: kusam baas bahu rang ghano sabh mithiaa balabanch |
lines.english: The many colors and scents of flowers - all worldly deceptions are transitory and false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚਮਿ ਪੰਚ ਪ੍ਰਧਾਨ ਤੇ ਜਿਹ ਜਾਨਿਓ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: pancham panch pradhaan te jih jaanio parapanch |
lines.english: The fifth day of the lunar cycle: They are the self-elect, the most distinguished, who know the true nature of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਜਾਪੈ ਨਹ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਨਹ ਕਛੁ ਕਰਤ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: neh jaapai neh boojheeai neh kachh karat beechaar |
lines.english: People do not see, and they do not understand; they do not reflect upon anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਆਦ ਮੋਹ ਰਸ ਬੇਧਿਓ ਅਗਿਆਨਿ ਰਚਿਓ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: suaad moh ras bedhio agiaan rachio sansaar |
lines.english: The world is pierced through with attachment to tastes and pleasures, engrossed in ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਣ ਕੀਨੇ ਕਰਮ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran bahu jon bhraman keene karam anek |
lines.english: Those who perform empty religious rituals will be born, only to die again. They wander through endless incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚਨਹਾਰੁ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰਿਓ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: rachanahaar neh simario man na beechaar bibek |
lines.english: They do not meditate in remembrance on the Creator Lord; their minds do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਰਲੇ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਜੋ ਨ ਰਚਹਿ ਪਰਪੰਚ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak birale paaeeeh jo na racheh parapanch |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, how rare are those, who are not engrossed in worldly entanglements. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਲਿਪਤ ਨ ਰੰਚ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau bhagat bhagavaan sang maaeaa lipat na ranch |
lines.english: By loving devotion to the Lord God, you shall not be polluted by Maya at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਦੁਆਰ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bhagat soheh gun gaavate naanak prabh kai duaar |6|
lines.english: The devotees look beauteous, O Nanak, when they sing the Glories of God at His Door. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਊਚੌ ਕਹਹਿ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: khatt saasatr aoochau kaheh ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: The six Shaastras proclaim Him to be the greatest; He has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਟਮਿ ਖਟ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਕਹਹਿ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਕਥਹਿ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: khasattam khatt saasatr kaheh sinmrit katheh anek |
lines.english: The sixth day of the lunar cycle: The six Shaastras say, and countless Simritees assert,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:
